tweet.text: August ’Rush 2 Give’ initiatives are in the books 🥳 Shout out @culturekings for letting us ‘RAID THE RACK’ ❕🩵 Let’s all continue to spread more love and positivity and uplift our community and the future generation! ✨ #IAMGIFTED https://t.co/egAkgJdd1c

RT @rachelgossen: A big thank you to @AlexMattison22 for sharing his family's story in honor of #CrucialCatch
https://t.co/z3ee3cLUpn
